calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
